name: Trident (Dummies Vs Noobs)
description:
$—❯(⚫)~ Introduction We have 8-20, Trident. If you are hooked, shoot at the glowing particles to free yourself, you, a soldier of the Dominion army, and the leadership sent you to the dunes, so that you lived through 8 waves, and trident appeared in the 9th wave, and as a result you were left alone (of course, you can try to rewrite the script, but I don't I guarantee it).

$—❯(⚠)~ Warning : Violence, NSWF, black humor, violent content are allowed.
